MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Oct-27-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:

DEFENDANT ERIC OERTEL's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Rhonda Fung CSR # 4819 (301/PJB)
